steps.title: Spot the coordinated verbs
steps.content: The relative clause links two verbs with and: are woven from sumac and [blank] bold colors, both applying to the plural subject which.

steps.title: Apply the parallel verb structure rule
steps.content:
Verbs joined by and must maintain parallel tense and subject agreement.

Since are woven is present tense, option A (feature) is also present tense plural, maintaining parallelism.

Options B, C, and D use past tenses, violating the rule. That matches choice A — A is correct.
